title: harden runner + stagger fan-out, pin playwright path
description:
## Summary
- Harden `walkSystemtest`: confirm save took effect before pushing the last step (no more double-counting on silent save failures); wait for the step counter to advance before the next read so persistent SSE connections don't cause duplicate reads.
- Anchor `walkSystemtestByTemplate` title prefix with a trailing colon (`System-Test 4:`) so it doesn't accidentally match `System-Test 40`.
- Stagger `systemtest-fanout.sh` spec starts by 25s/slot so parallel Keycloak logins don't all hit simultaneously.
- Switch executed paths (Taskfile, `runner.sh`, `systemtest-fanout.sh`) from `npx playwright` to `./node_modules/.bin/playwright` for deterministic resolution. Doc comments and CI workflows keep `npx`/conceptual-name idiom on purpose.

## Test plan
- [ ] `task test:e2e -- --project=systemtest --grep "System-Test 4"` runs cleanly
- [ ] `bash scripts/systemtest-fanout.sh 04 05 06` shows staggered starts in the log timestamps
- [ ] Walker no longer double-pushes the final step when the save round-trip is slow

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
